name: Fiesta Casserole
recipeInstructions:
3 Tablespoons Chili powder
15 ounces Tomato sauce -- canned
22 ounces Elbow macaroni -- cooked as directed
2 cans cream of mushroom soup
1 can milk
1/2 pound cheese bread -- grated
1. Brown hamburger lightly.
2. Add chopped onion and sauté until softened, but not browned.
3. Stir in chili powder, tomato sauce, and salt.
4. Simmer the mixture for about 15 minutes.
5. Combine cooked macaroni with the meat mixture.
6. Transfer everything to a large casserole dish.
7. Mix cream of mushroom soup and milk separately.
8. Pour the soup mixture over the noodle and meat combination.
9. Sprinkle cheese on top.
10. Bake for 30 minutes at 350°F (175°C), or until heated through in the microwave set to high power for about 15-20 minutes.
This makes a huge amount. You will need to halve this recipe or use two pans unless you have one that is large enough.
